nasb.text: O daughter of my people, put on sackcloth And roll in ashes; Mourn as for an only son, A lamentation most bitter. For suddenly the destroyer Will come upon us.

esv.text: O daughter of my people, put on sackcloth, and roll in ashes; make mourning as for an only son, most bitter lamentation, for suddenly the destroyer will come upon us.

cnv.text: 我的同胞啊！應當披上麻布， 在灰塵中打滾， 悲哀如喪獨生子， 號咷痛哭， 因為有行毀滅的 會突然攻擊我們。

ccb.text: 百姓啊，你们要身披麻布， 在灰中打滚； 你们要悲伤痛哭，如丧独子， 因为毁灭者将突然临到我们。
